name: codanna
description: Local Codex wrapper for the official Codanna MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Code intelligence for Codex via Codanna MCP.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex wrapper that starts the official Codanna MCP server so Codex can use semantic code search, relationship tracing, and indexed documentation retrieval.
defaultPrompt: Activate Codanna for the current project.
Install Codanna if it is missing from this machine.
Initialize the current project for Codanna and create its first index when needed.
Use Codanna to search code semantically.
Use Codanna to trace calls, callers, and impact before edits.
